verticalSliceName: VANTARIS ONE Airport POC Vertical Slice

transitions.boundary: EDGE connector -> LINK envelope -> ONE intake adapter
transitions.missingImplementation: Production EDGE/LINK runtime, heartbeat, DLQ handling, source-system registry
transitions.testRequirement: Contract validation + dry-run connector registry; integration health acceptance tests

transitions.sourceObject: Normalized object with source identity and tag references
transitions.targetObject: Canonical Device, Point, Tag with SourceIdentity
transitions.boundary: In-process reconciliation / compatibility façade (no public write API yet)
transitions.missingImplementation: Production persistence, airport Terminal spatial model, 270k-point scale path
transitions.testRequirement: Existing asset_graph reconciliation and ephemeral read-model tests; airport-scale soak plan

transitions.sourceObject: Interpreted alarm with resolved device/point global IDs
transitions.boundary: Adapter API/event boundary — UFMS owns alarm SoR
transitions.missingImplementation: UFMS adapter runtime, deduplication, severity/state model, ack/clear
transitions.testRequirement: Adapter contract tests; alarm lifecycle acceptance scenarios

transitions.boundary: UFMS in-process / adapter — not IBMS-owned persistence
transitions.missingImplementation: FaultCase runtime, correlation, priority, SLA, escalation
transitions.testRequirement: UFMS adapter integration tests; fault case creation from alarm fixture

transitions.sourceObject: FaultCase with impact and assignment context
transitions.boundary: UFMS emits intent; ONE Work Management consumes — no UMMS-owned generic WorkOrder
transitions.testRequirement: Cross-module intent handoff tests; idempotency on intent creation

transitions.boundary: Public work API — UMMS must not own generic WorkOrder SoR
transitions.missingImplementation: /api/v1/work Flask routes, lifecycle, SLA, asset/alarm/fault links
transitions.testRequirement: Work management API tests; intent-to-work-order acceptance
transitions.uiRepresentation: Maintenance Work Orders (PARTIAL — UMMS mock only)

transitions.requiredContract: UMMS maintenance extension manifest; association to WorkOrder by reference
transitions.boundary: UMMS extends maintenance — references canonical WorkOrder, does not replace SoR
transitions.missingImplementation: Real dispatch, inspection/checklist, technician workflow, DB persistence
transitions.testRequirement: UMMS corrective maintenance slice tests linked to WorkOrder ID

transitions.targetObject: EvidenceRecord with provenance and integrity hash
transitions.boundary: Evidence Center SoR — governance audit binding required
transitions.missingImplementation: Fault/work-order/event relationship wiring; durable evidence store
transitions.testRequirement: Evidence integrity tests; maintenance-closure evidence linkage

transitions.sourceObject: Aggregated operational metrics and evidence-backed KPIs
transitions.targetObject: Airport dashboard tiles and report query results
transitions.boundary: Read-only projection — UConsole is not business SoR
transitions.missingImplementation: Airport Overview, alarm/fault KPIs, MTTA/MTTR, integration availability metrics
transitions.testRequirement: Report query contract tests; airport acceptance dashboard scenarios

verticalSliceGaps: No production EDGE/LINK delivery path for external BMS/EMS/CCTV alarms
No source-system registry service with vendor/type/integration metadata
Asset Graph write path and airport Terminal spatial types not production-ready
UFMS adapter and canonical Alarm/FaultCase runtime absent from IBMS
Canonical /api/v1/work not implemented; UMMS mock creates ownership confusion risk
Evidence Center not linked to fault/work-order lifecycle
Six of eight airport POC pages are MISSING, PLACEHOLDER, or PARTIAL only

ownershipConflicts.description: UMMS exposes mock work orders at /api/v1/umms/work-orders while canonical WorkOrder owner is ONE Work Management at /api/v1/work
ownershipConflicts.resolution: UMMS must reference canonical WorkOrder IDs only; implement /api/v1/work in AIRPORT-A5
